description_long: This object is a very small doll, barely visible at the center of each image, suggesting a miniature scale. The doll appears to have a humanoid shape, with a discernible head, torso, and limbs, but no detailed features or clothing are visible due to the extreme distance and minimal pixel size. The color is predominantly a dark tone, possibly black or dark brown, with no other colors or patterns apparent. The surface seems smooth and uniform, likely made from plastic or a similar synthetic material. There are no visible accessories, facial features, or interactive parts. The overall form is simple and compact, suitable for use as a toy in urban play areas or as a collectible.
description: A tiny, dark-colored, featureless doll with a smooth, simple humanoid shape and no visible details or accessories.
description_view_0: From this view, the doll appears as a tiny dark dot at the center, with no distinguishable features.
description_view_1: The doll remains a small, dark speck, with no new details visible from this angle.
description_view_2: The object is still a minuscule dark point, with no discernible changes or features.
description_view_3: This view also shows the doll as a tiny, featureless dot, consistent with the other perspectives.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing or discernible style due to the object's extremely small and featureless appearance.
attribute_pose: The doll is upright with a static, neutral pose; head, arms, and legs are not distinctly visible.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are visible.
